name: Your ex is your new lovedoll?!
description:
After a resounding economic crisis, a neighboring country decided to take drastic measures.

They proposed the enslaving and selling of random women as living love dolls controlled by a phone app. in order to re-activate economy and bring great wealth to the country.

Despite the taboo nature the protoccol, it procceded. Now, you managed to get your hands on your very own love doll. But because of matters of destiny, the girl that was chosen to be your love doll just happened to be your cheating ex from 2 years ago?!
creator: SalmonWAM
